ModMetaData.name: DeepTalk - AI Colonist Conversations
ModMetaData.author: NuSyQ-Hub
ModMetaData.description:
DeepTalk gives your colonists deeper, more meaningful conversations powered by local AI.
Features: - Colonists have contextual conversations based on their traits, mood, and relationships - Uses local LLM (Ollama) - no internet required, your data stays private - Conversations affect social interactions and relationships - Lightweight and performance-friendly
Requirements: - Ollama running locally (http://localhost:11434) - Any small LLM model (phi3.5, llama3.1:8b recommended)
Setup: 1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.ai 2. Run: ollama pull phi3.5:latest 3. Start Ollama: ollama serve 4. Enable this mod and enjoy!
